metadata.label: gen2/AppliedIntuition-CloudInfra
metadata.title: Software Engineer - Cloud Infrastructure
metadata.team_direction: is a leading company in the field of physical AI, creating the digital infrastructure necessary for intelligent machines

revision_priority: 修正 Summary 第 3 句及 DiDi Project blockquote 中 "**2022 city**" / "**2023 city**" / "**20+ city**" 的加粗范围，将 "city" 移出粗体，仅保留数字加粗。
修订 Summary 首句 "3+ years building Go, Java, and Python services" 措辞，明确 Go 资历仅限 TikTok 实习阶段（6 个月），避免 HR 对照时间线时产生可信度疑问。

findings.field: Professional Summary; TikTok and DiDi Experience bullets
findings.issue: Modifiers and scope phrases such as `team-maintained`, `internal`, `13-person`, and `20+ city` are bolded. That creates emphasis noise and weakens the visual contrast reserved for technologies and measurable outcomes.
findings.fix: Keep bold only on technologies, systems, and hard metrics. Remove bold from descriptive qualifiers and ownership phrases.

findings.issue: The opening frame leads with `Transitioning from data analysis to software engineering`, so the first screen reads like a career-change note before the infra/backend signal.
findings.fix: Open with the target role/domain first, then move the transition note later or compress it into a short trailing clause.

findings.issue: The Programming and Cloud groups each surface many active tools/languages at once, which reads like a stack laundry list instead of a sharply anchored backend/infrastructure profile.
findings.fix: Keep each Skills category to the 4-6 strongest items and let the experience bullets carry the secondary tool evidence; preserve the JD must-haves, but stop presenting every supported tool as equally primary.

revision_priority: [MUST] Rewrite Summary bullet 1 so it opens with the target infra/backend/security role instead of the transition narrative.
[MUST] Compress the Skills section so each category shows only the core stack, not every supported tool at the same prominence level.
[SHOULD] Remove bold from modifiers and scope adjectives such as `team-maintained`, `internal`, `13-person`, and `20+ city`.
[NICE] Keep the rest of the structure; it is parseable and mostly compliant.
raw_json.revision_instructions: Rewrite the first summary bullet to lead with the target role/domain, e.g. an infra/backend/security framing, and move or shorten the transition note. Trim `Skills` so each category shows only the strongest core items, while the experience bullets continue to prove the rest of the stack. Remove bold from qualifiers and scope adjectives like `team-maintained`, `internal`, `13-person`, and `20+ city`; reserve emphasis for technologies and measurable outcomes.

[SHOULD] Remove bold from modifiers and scope adjectives such as `team-maintained`, `internal`, `13-person`, and `20+ city`.
[NICE] Keep the rest of the structure; it is parseable and mostly compliant.
